violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Discussed options for acquiring Serve Safe managers certificate. Current operator certificate expired.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under equipment and shelving units around fryers, in wlk in cooler, and in dish area have abuildup of debris and need cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Linoleum flooring in dish area torn/damaged. Floor tile in walk in cooler cracked/broken.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. West delivery door not provided with self closing device.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
